# How Sift Works

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Get a deep dive into Sift’s technology stack, data sources and processing, and machine learning models.

Read this ebook to get:

*   A deep dive into the Sift technology stack
*   Information on Sift’s data sources, data infrastructure, and data preparation
*   An overview of how Sift’s machine learning catches fraud

## Dare to grow differently.

Flip the switch on fraud-fueled fear. Make risk work for your business and scale securely into new markets with Sift’s AI-powered platform.
